title: Standalone On-Premises Served License
text: Standalone On-Premises Served License A standalone on-premises served license runs on a single machine and uses a local license file. It is sometimes referred to as a node-locked license. It requires no internet connection. You are given an Entitlement ID when you register with Uniface, which allows you to access the Sentinel EMS customer portal , where you can lock your license to a specific machine and obtain the actual license file. To configure a standalone on-premises served license, see Configuring Standalone On-Premises Served Licenses . To return a standalone on-premises served license, see Returning Standalone On-Premises Served Licenses . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
